name: estudiar
description: **Edit a file, create a new file, and clone from Bitbucket in under 2 minutes**

scripts.copy: copyfiles -u 1 css/*.css distri/css && copyfiles *.html distri && copyfiles -u 3 node_modules/bootstrap/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css distri/css && copyfiles -u 3 node_modules/bootstrap/dist/js/bootstrap.min.js distri/js
scripts.distri: npm run build && npm run copy
